Our Services

Personalized chiropractic care and advanced drug-free therapies designed to help you heal with confidence.

Core Service

Personalized Chiropractic Care

At Back to Wellness Chiropractic, we help people across Kirkwood and the greater St. Louis area find relief from back pain, neck tension, headaches, sciatica, and more — with chiropractic care tailored to your body and lifestyle.

Our experienced team focuses on gentle, non-invasive treatment that supports real, lasting results. Every treatment plan begins with a one-on-one consultation and detailed exam to understand your unique needs and goals.

✓Back pain and lower back care
✓Neck tension and stiffness relief
✓Headache and migraine management
✓Sciatica and nerve pain treatment
✓Injury recovery and rehabilitation
Request an Appointment
Advanced Therapy

SoftWave Therapy

SoftWave Therapy is a non-invasive treatment that uses acoustic waves to stimulate your body's natural healing process. By increasing circulation and encouraging cellular repair, it helps reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support faster recovery without medication, injections, or surgery.

This therapy is especially helpful for conditions like plantar fasciitis, tennis elbow, shoulder pain, knee pain, and other joint or soft tissue injuries. It's also commonly used for chronic pain, sports injuries, and overuse conditions such as tendinitis. Many patients report noticeable relief within the first few sessions.

💡 New patients: consultation and initial SoftWave treatment for just $49.

Book Your $49 Treatment
Advanced Therapy

Red Light Therapy

Red Light Therapy uses low-level wavelengths of light to stimulate cellular activity, improve circulation, and support the body's natural healing processes. This non-invasive treatment is known for reducing inflammation, relieving joint and muscle pain, and promoting faster recovery from physical stress.

In addition to pain relief, Red Light Therapy is often used to support body contouring, reduce the appearance of stubborn fat, and assist with weight management goals when combined with a healthy lifestyle. It may help improve skin tone and reduce inflammation that can contribute to bloating or water retention.

💡 New patients: consultation and initial Red Light treatment for just $49.

Book Your $49 Session
Conditions We Treat

Comprehensive Care for Various Conditions

Back Pain

Targeted adjustments and therapies to address acute and chronic back pain at its source.

Neck Tension

Gentle corrections and soft tissue work to relieve stiffness, tension, and restricted mobility.

Headaches

Chiropractic care that addresses cervicogenic and tension headaches by improving alignment.

Sciatica

Precise adjustments and therapies to relieve sciatic nerve pressure and radiating pain.

Plantar Fasciitis

SoftWave therapy that delivers acoustic waves to reduce plantar inflammation and pain.

Sports Injuries

Recovery support for tendinitis, overuse conditions, and soft tissue injuries from athletics.

Common Questions

Service FAQ

How many SoftWave sessions will I need?
Many patients report noticeable relief within the first few sessions. The exact number depends on your condition, its severity, and your body's response to treatment. We'll discuss your expected treatment timeline during your consultation.
Is SoftWave Therapy painful?
SoftWave Therapy is generally well-tolerated. Most patients feel mild discomfort at most during treatment. The acoustic waves create a gentle pulsing sensation, and sessions are typically short. Any post-treatment soreness usually resolves within a day or two.
Can Red Light Therapy help with weight management?
Red Light Therapy may support body contouring and assist with weight management goals when combined with a healthy lifestyle. It can help reduce the appearance of stubborn fat and reduce inflammation that contributes to bloating or water retention. It's not a standalone weight loss solution but can be a helpful complement.
Do I need a referral for chiropractic care?
No referral is needed. You can call us directly at (314) 394-2093 to schedule your appointment. We welcome new patients and offer same-day appointments when available.

Find Out Which Treatment Is Right for You

Book a consultation today and let our experienced team create a personalized plan for your recovery.
